description.content: Operations for managing test cases within test suites

item.name: Azure DevOps List test cases in a suite

request.name: Azure DevOps List test cases in a suite

description.content: Returns a list of test cases within a specific test suite. Test cases are work items of type Test Case that contain the test steps and expected results for manual or automated tests.

Comma-separated work item field reference names to include

Whether to return identity fields as full IdentityRef objects
Maximum number of test cases to return
Whether to include test cases from child suites

Operations for managing test plans
Returns a list of test plans in the project. Test plans are the top-level containers for organizing test suites and test cases. They are typically associated with a release milestone or sprint.

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
Filter test plans by owner (user display name or email)
Whether to return full plan details or just IDs and names
Return only active (non-completed) test plans
Continuation token for paginated results
Whether to return plans sorted by last update

item.name: Azure DevOps Create a test plan

request.name: Azure DevOps Create a test plan

description.content: Creates a new test plan in the project. A test plan defines the scope of testing for a release, milestone, or sprint. It can be associated with an area path and iteration path to align with the project structure.

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

variable.description: Azure DevOps organization name or ID
Azure DevOps project name or ID

response.name: Test plan created successfully

variable.description: Azure DevOps organization name or ID
Azure DevOps project name or ID

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Sprint 5 Test Plan",
  "areaPath": "MyProject\\Frontend",
  "iteration": "MyProject\\Sprint 5",
  "description": "Test plan for Sprint 5 user stories",
  "startDate": "2024-03-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2024-03-15T00:00:00Z"
}

Operations for managing test suites within test plans
Returns a list of test suites within a test plan. Test suites organize test cases into logical groups. A plan always has a root suite, and suites can be nested for hierarchical organization.

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

Continuation token for paginated results
Return suites in a tree structure

item.name: Azure DevOps Create a test suite

request.name: Azure DevOps Create a test suite

description.content: Creates a new test suite within a test plan. Suites can be static (manually added test cases), requirement-based (linked to work item queries), or query-based (dynamic results from a work item query).

REST API for managing test plans, test suites, and test cases in Azure Test Plans. Provides programmatic access to quality assurance and testing workflows, enabling teams to create and manage structured test plans, organize tests into suites, and link test cases to work items.

 Name: Microsoft Azure DevOps
